title: Hiring Store Manager at Taj Hotels Retail

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Taj Hotels Retail
jsonLd.description:
Taj Hotels Retail is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Taj Hotels Retail:
Taj Hotels Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels Retail!
